description: Evaluation fixtures for an offline, privacy-first macOS dictation assistant semantic editor and correction pipeline.

input.raw_transcript: update for the release thread colon I can ship the SAGE CometBFT integration by Thursday correction Friday if Ollama smoke tests pass
input.cursor_context: Team is coordinating a release in a Slack channel.

expected.edited_text: Update for the release thread: I can ship the SAGE CometBFT integration by Friday if Ollama smoke tests pass.

corrections.reason: Explicit spoken correction overrides the earlier date.

input.raw_transcript: hi maya comma thanks for meeting today period please send the Utimaco quote and the CSe100 data sheet before Friday period I will review the Ed25519 signing requirements after that period best comma lee
input.cursor_context: Composing a follow-up email to a hardware security partner.

expected.edited_text:
Hi Maya,

Thanks for meeting today. Please send the Utimaco quote and the CSe100 data sheet before Friday. I will review the Ed25519 signing requirements after that.

Best,
Lee

must_not_include: ed two five five one nine

input.raw_transcript: shopping list new line eggs new line oat milk new line coffee beans new line apples new line and toothpaste
input.cursor_context: Creating a quick personal shopping list in Apple Notes.

expected.edited_text:
Shopping list:
- Eggs
- Oat milk
- Coffee beans
- Apples
- Toothpaste

expected.edited_text: // TODO: Keep SAGE replay deterministic while CometBFT is offline and route Ollama retries through the local queue.

input.raw_transcript: research note colon compare SAGE memory recall with CometBFT consensus logs comma Ollama local inference comma Utimaco hardware keys comma CSe100 provisioning comma and Ed25519 signatures
